[newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22Obergiesing%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22Obergiesing%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22Obergiesing%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22Obergiesing%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(September 2016)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

(German pronunciation: [[ˈoːbɐˌɡiːzɪŋ]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Standard_German "Help:IPA/Standard German") [ⓘ](/wiki/File:LL-Q188_(deu)-Ionenlaser-Obergiesing.wav "File:LL-Q188 (deu)-Ionenlaser-Obergiesing.wav"), lit. 'Upper [Giesing](/wiki/Giesing "Giesing")'; [Central Bavarian](/wiki/Central_Bavarian "Central Bavarian"): *Obagiasing*) is a borough of [Munich](/wiki/Munich "Munich"), about 5km south-east of the city center. The larger part is residential or a mix of business and residential, but there are also a number of recreational facilities.

"[Accès - Transports](http://www.lycee-jean-renoir.de/spip.php?article1) [Archived](https://web.archive.org/web/20150214181600/http://lycee-jean-renoir.de/spip.php?article1) 2015-02-14 at the [Wayback Machine](/wiki/Wayback_Machine "Wayback Machine")." *[Lycée Jean Renoir](/wiki/Lyc%C3%A9e_Jean_Renoir_(Munich) "Lycée Jean Renoir (Munich)")*. Retrieved on 22 January 2015. "Plan d’accès au site de l’école primaire (Maternelle et Élémentaire), Ungsteinerstr. 50 (Quartier de Giesing) 81539 München : Métro U2 ou U7 ou encore S3 ou S7, arrêt "Giesing"."

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/17/M%C3%BCnchen_-_Stadtbezirk_17_%28Karte%29_-_Obergiesing.png/250px-M%C3%BCnchen_-_Stadtbezirk_17_%28Karte%29_-_Obergiesing.png)](/wiki/File:M%C3%BCnchen_-_Stadtbezirk_17_(Karte)_-_Obergiesing.png)

District map

**Obergiesing** (German pronunciation: [[ˈoːbɐˌɡiːzɪŋ]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Standard_German "Help:IPA/Standard German") [ⓘ](/wiki/File:LL-Q188_(deu)-Ionenlaser-Obergiesing.wav "File:LL-Q188 (deu)-Ionenlaser-Obergiesing.wav"), lit. 'Upper [Giesing](/wiki/Giesing "Giesing")'; [Central Bavarian](/wiki/Central_Bavarian "Central Bavarian"): *Obagiasing*) is a borough of [Munich](/wiki/Munich "Munich"), about 5km south-east of the city center. The larger part is residential or a mix of business and residential, but there are also a number of recreational facilities.

## Education

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Obergiesing&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Education")]

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [[icon]](/wiki/File:Wiki_letter_w_cropped.svg) | This section **needs expansion**. You can help by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Obergiesing&action=edit&section=). *(January 2015)* |

The [Lycée Jean Renoir](/wiki/Lyc%C3%A9e_Jean_Renoir_(Munich) "Lycée Jean Renoir (Munich)"), a French international school, maintains its primary school campus in Giesing.[[1]](#cite_note-1)
